# Talkbook Layout Cheat Sheet

## Recommendation
- `recommendations-blue`: first recommendation page.
- `recommendations-white`: follow-up recommendation detail.
- `quad-blue`: four-priority recommendation matrix.

## Comparison
- `two-column-comparison`: option A vs option B.
- `2-column-blue-heading`: emphasized side-by-side story.
- `2-column-white-heading`: analytical side-by-side story.

## Data Visualization
- `2-column-chart`: narrative + chart.
- `1-column-chart-text`: chart-led single story.
- `3-column-chart-text`: TAM/SAM/SOM and multi-driver stories.

## Process
- `process-flow-horizontal`: short named phases.
- `process-flow-vertical`: longer phase descriptions.
- `timeline-milestones`: dated roadmap narrative.

## Frameworks
- `quad-box-icon-center-text`: 4-player or 4-pillar view.
- `table-insights-two-column`: table + insights.
- `risks-mitigations`: paired risk response framing.

## Structural Slides
- `cover-hero-blue`, `agenda-blue`, `section-divider-blue`.
- `transition-quote`, `quote-callout-blue`.
- `appendix-sources`, `table-appendix`, `back-cover-blue`.
